subcodes.first_line: O Thou Provider, O Thou Forgiver! Sinners though we be, treading the path of rebellion, yet we knock at the door of Thy pardon
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا آمرزگارا هر چند گنهکاریم و ره عصیان پوئیم ولی باب عفو کوبیم و رضای تو
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition
